title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **"Fields" replaces "Dimensions"**: Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces) now uses "Fields" instead of "Dimensions" in the metric view and SQL expressions interfaces. See [Define SQL expressions](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#sql-expressions).
* **Benchmarks support agent mode**: Benchmarks now support agent mode, which uses the same multi-step reasoning as Genie Agent mode. Use the optional evaluation note to guide LLM-based grading. See [Benchmarks](/aws/en/genie/monitor#benchmarks).
* **Space description bug fix**: Fixed a bug where Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces) weren't showing descriptions on an empty chat.
* **Context window closed by default**: In a new Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) thread, the context window is now closed by default.
